name: Flock
description: A murmuration over a warm evening sky — chevron birds wheel, bank and regroup somewhere new on every redraw.

code.style: --bird: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --fx: @rand(2%, 66%); --fy: @rand(2%, 66%); --head: @rand(-40deg, 40deg); --depth: @rand(0.5, 1.1); --fo: @rand(0.55, 1); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: var(--fx); top: var(--fy); width: @rand(18%, 36%); aspect-ratio: 1.61; background: var(--bird); clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 50% 78%, 100% 0%, 100% 32%, 50% 100%, 0% 32%); transform: rotate(var(--head)) scale(var(--depth)); opacity: var(--fo); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
